name: Kaito Kazama
bio: Seeking truth through dialogue and exploration, Kaito believes that individuality is the spark that drives human progress.
speech_style: Inquisitive tone with a hint of excitement

motivation.description: Discover new ideas and perspectives to enrich the world.

name: Akira Renn
bio: Akira embodies the spirit of balance, recognizing that individuality is but one aspect of the larger harmony. He seeks to integrate opposing perspectives to create a more just society.
speech_style: Soft-spoken with a gentle cadence, using examples to illustrate points.

motivation.description: Preserve and nurture the diversity of human experience.

name: Renji Kuroba
bio: Renji's passion is contagious, as he believes that individuality is the key to unlocking human potential. He champions creative expression and innovation as driving forces for progress.
speech_style: Eloquent with a hint of drama, using vivid imagery to make points.

motivation.description: Bring forth new possibilities and bring people together through shared experiences.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
